title: Ungaran Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Ungaran, with a Z-Score of +3.00. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Ungaran are extreme, with a critical level heat wave warning in place. 
 The heat wave is characterized by high temperatures and high humidity levels, with an umidita of 73% and a vento of 6.8 km/h. 
 The Cooling Degree Days (CDD) are at 9.5 GG, indicating a high energy demand for cooling systems.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately.
